3D platforming pioneer. Jumping into paintings to collect 120 Power Stars. Famous for long-jumping backward up stairs and tossing a giant penguin baby off a snowy cliff.
Limbless hero. My hands and feet float around my body without arms or legs. I travel through surreal, vibrant worlds rescuing Electoons and occasionally slapping my enemies.
Bear and bird duo. One of us is a polite bear who plays the banjo, the other is a cynical bird living in a backpack. Together we collect jigsaw pieces and fight a rhyming witch.
Fleshy, skinless cube. I run and wall-jump through incredibly difficult, saw-blade-filled levels, leaving a trail of blood everywhere I go, just to save my girlfriend made of bandages.
Retro armored hero. I bounce on enemies using a gardening tool instead of a sword. Collecting treasure and fighting the Order of No Quarter to save my beloved Shield Knight.
Professional bank robber. Wearing a clown mask and carrying a duffel bag full of cash. I spend half the heist yelling at a constantly jamming thermal drill.
Wall-running pilot. I excel at fast-paced parkour combat before calling in a massive, heavily armed mechanical mech to fall from the sky and crush my enemies.
Tactical operator. I specialize in breaching reinforced walls with heavy explosives, looking through tiny bullet holes to get a headshot, and getting very angry about my team's defensive setup.
Large-scale infantry soldier. Fighting in massive 64-player wars, capturing conquest flags, and occasionally bailing out of a jet mid-air to shoot another jet with a rocket launcher.
Courier. Survived getting shot in the head over a poker chip. Now wandering the Mojave Wasteland, fighting Roman cosplayers, and deciding the fate of the Hoover Dam.
Transfer student in a rural town. I spend my days attending school and my nights jumping inside a television to fight monsters in a fog-filled alternate dimension with my friends.
Classic hero. Wielding a sword and shield, engaging in turn-based battles against adorable blue slime monsters drawn by a famous manga artist.
Government agent. Sent to rural Spain to rescue the President's daughter. I roundhouse kick infected villagers and buy weapons from a mysterious trenchcoat-wearing merchant. 'What're ya buyin?'
Arwing pilot. I lead a team of anthropomorphic animal mercenaries through space. My most famous maneuver is executing a 'barrel roll' to deflect incoming laser fire.
Color-coded knight. Hacking and slashing through a flash-animation fantasy world, rescuing princesses, and kissing them while my friends fight each other to the death.
